fields.name: To-do No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the to-do to which the meeting applies.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line number of the to-do to which the meeting applies.

This field is used internally.

fields.name: Attendance Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of attendance for the meeting. You can select from: Required, Optional and Task Organizer.

fields.name: Attendee Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the attendee. You can choose from Contact or Salesperson.

fields.name: Attendee No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the attendee participating in the task.

fields.name: Attendee Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the attendee participating in the task.

fields.name: Send Invitation
fields.tooltip: Specifies that you want to send an invitation to the attendee by e-mail. The Send Invitation option is only available for contacts and salespeople with an e-mail address. The Send Invitation option is not available for the meeting organizer.

fields.name: Invitation Response Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the attendee's response to a meeting invitation.

fields.name: Invitation Sent
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the meeting invitation has been sent to the attendee. The Send Invitation option is not available for the meeting organizer.
